CIPHER.248.cipherString: Writing, when properly managed (as you may be sure I think mine is) is but a different name for conversation.
CIPHER.248.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote by Laurence Sterne, written in an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.248.author: Laurence Sterne

CIPHER.225.question: The janitor found this strange paper strip on some equipment in the closet. It's a quote, encoded with a Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 9105 728 3406 decode to?

CIPHER.232.cipherString: Las dudas en tu mente son un obstáculo mucho mayor para el éxito que los obstáculos en el viaje.
CIPHER.232.question: You intercept a mysterious radio signal. Decoding it reveals a quote by Orrin Woodward in Spanish encrypted as a Xenocrypt using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.232.author: Orrin Woodward
CIPHER.232.translation: Doubts in your mind are a much greater roadblock to success than obstacles on the journey.

CIPHER.237.question: A vending machine just dispensed a candy wrapper with this Cryptarithm code. What do the values 4561 32 189250 decode to?

CIPHER.243.cipherString: You have to hold back yourself. Calm down; your heart will prompt you to achieve nothing.
CIPHER.243.question: Found taped under a desk in study hall: this Checkerboard cipher encrypted using a Polybius key of BEHAVIOURS. What does it say?

CIPHER.236.cipherString: There was beauty in the idea of freedom, but it was an illusion. Every human heart was chained by love.
CIPHER.236.question: You find this encoded quote written inside the cover of a chemistry reference book. It's attributed to Cassandra Clare, encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.236.author: Cassandra Clare

CIPHER.241.cipherString: When you honor the precepts of life, and fulfil your purpose, you will be delighted by its magnificence.
CIPHER.241.question: Your microscope slide prep strangely revealed this Complete Columnar message by Gift Gugu Mona. The quote has FLIFE somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.241.author: Gift Gugu Mona

CIPHER.235.cipherString: Let your trouble tarry till its own day comes.
CIPHER.235.question: A mysterious QR code revealed a Proverb encoded in the Baconian cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.235.author: Proverb

CIPHER.242.cipherString: The Future ... is like a puzzle -- with missing pieces -- difficult to read, and never, NEVER, what you think.
CIPHER.242.question: You uncover this encoded note tucked behind a microscope slide. It's a quote, written in an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?

CIPHER.245.cipherString: Our attitude towards others determines their attitude towards us.
CIPHER.245.question: Someone left this encrypted quote scribbled on the chalkboard before class began. It's a quote by Earl Nightingale, written as a Porta using a keyword of SECOND. What does it say?
CIPHER.245.author: Earl Nightingale

CIPHER.228.cipherString: Tennis is a perfect combination of violent action taking place in an atmosphere of total tranquillity.
CIPHER.228.question: The gym's scoreboard glitched during dodgeball to show this Aristocrat Cipher by Billie Jean King using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains OF. What does it say?
CIPHER.228.author: Billie Jean King

CIPHER.222.question: You find this encoded line written in invisible ink on a lab safety poster. It's a quote by Motto, written in a Hill with a keyword of TURN. What does it say?
CIPHER.222.author: Motto

CIPHER.246.cipherString: The most terrifying words in the English language are: I'm from the government and I'm here to help.
CIPHER.246.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Ronald Reagan encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.246.author: Ronald Reagan

CIPHER.227.cipherString: Great interests are apt to clash with each other.
CIPHER.227.question: Upon searching a room, the following were found on scraps of paper. You are told it's a quote by Lucan encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of WORN and polybius key of EXHAUSTING. What does it say?
CIPHER.227.author: Lucan

CIPHER.230.cipherString: Whoever stole my copy of Microsoft Office, I will hunt you down and I will make you pay... You have my Word!
CIPHER.230.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after science club. It's a quote encoded using an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the the single letter U maps to the letter I. What does it say?
CIPHER.230.author: Unknown

CIPHER.233.cipherString: Power does not concede without a demand, and neither does patriarchy,
CIPHER.233.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote by Monica Geingos, written in a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has DOESP somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.233.author: Monica Geingos

CIPHER.226.cipherString: Fear means being afraid of the future. When you are not ready to accept the future moments, it becomes fear.
CIPHER.226.question: Found on a microchip inside a disassembled robotics kit: this Aristocrat Cipher by Nithyananda using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.226.author: Nithyananda

CIPHER.234.cipherString: Absence of occupation is not rest. A mind quite vacant is a mind distressed.
CIPHER.234.question: A weathered note is found inside an old science textbook. The writing appears to be a quote by COWPER encoded as a Checkerboard with a polybius key of OVERPLAYING. What does it say?
CIPHER.234.author: COWPER

CIPHER.244.cipherString: The problem inherent in the surface of things, and only in the surface of things, is the heart of things.
CIPHER.244.question: Found inside a hollowed-out periodic table book: this Aristocrat Cipher hides Leo Strauss's insight. What does it say?
CIPHER.244.author: Leo Strauss

CIPHER.224.cipherString: It is risky not to take calculated risks in life.
CIPHER.224.question: Your lab partner discovered this pattern on the back of a graphing calculator. It's a quote by Gift Gugu Mona, encoded as a Baconian. You are told that the deciphered text starts with IT IS. What does it say?
CIPHER.224.author: Gift Gugu Mona

CIPHER.239.cipherString: If you use tact, you can say anything, then make it funny.
CIPHER.239.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque. They represent a quote by Dane Cook, encoded using a Nihilist Substitution Cipher with a keyword of STUDIO and polybius key of UNSPOILED. What does it say?
CIPHER.239.author: Dane Cook

CIPHER.240.cipherString: If you want to correct your own failings, you do not have the time to waste in blaming other people.
CIPHER.240.question: This coded note is discovered inside a sealed envelope labeled “Confidential.” It's a quote from A Calendar of Wisdom, encoded using an Aristocrat Cipher using a K2 alphabet. What was the K2 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.240.author: A Calendar of Wisdom

CIPHER.247.cipherString: Shadows are like plants. They need sunlight simply to exist.
CIPHER.247.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote, written in a Fractionated Morse Cipher. You are told that the quote starts with SHADOW. What does it say?

CIPHER.231.cipherString: We don't like their sound, and guitar music is on the way out.
CIPHER.231.question: Etched into the surface of a melted vinyl record, you found this Complete Columnar-encrypted quote by Decca Recording Company. The quote has MUSIC somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.231.author: Decca Recording Company

CIPHER.238.cipherString: The further you progress, the higher the ideal of perfection toward which you strive rises.
CIPHER.238.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote from A Calendar of Wisdom, encoded using an Aristocrat Cipher. You are told that the cipher contains the word you twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.238.author: A Calendar of Wisdom

CIPHER.229.cipherString: Memories are made in the creation of fictional characters.
CIPHER.229.question: Your drone photographed some weird markings in a parking lot. Turns out it's a quote by Mitta Xinindlu in a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.229.author: Mitta Xinindlu

CIPHER.223.cipherString: The Eskimo have fifty-two names for snow because it is important to them; there ought to be as many for love.
CIPHER.223.question: Found frozen inside an ice core sample from the Arctic: this Aristocrat message by Margaret Atwood. You are told that the cipher starts with THE. What does it say?
CIPHER.223.author: Margaret Atwood
